_substrate_anchors._note: Every field below is substrate-cited per Phase B.2 discipline. Anchors point at the upstream artefact each value mirrors. NOT part of the Zenodo paste payload; strip the leading-underscore keys before paste.
_substrate_anchors.title_source: d2_note.pdf metadata pdftitle (d2_note.tex L24-L25, L57-L59); zenodo_description_d2_note.txt L3 of D2-NOTE-DRAFT session 2026-05-02
_substrate_anchors.creator_source: d2_note.tex L60 (\author{Mauricio Echizen Kubo}); ORCID 0009-0000-6192-8273 from tex/submitted/submission_log.txt L284 (file-tail signature line)
_substrate_anchors.keywords_source: d2_note.tex pdfkeywords L31-L32 (5 verbatim); + 'SIARC' / 'PCF' / 'xi_0' carried forward from prior 2026-05-02 runbook section 2 (project-shorthand, also present in d2_note.tex body)
_substrate_anchors.license_source: tex/submitted/submission_log.txt Zenodo subsection items 1-10 (none deviates from CC-BY-4.0); D2-NOTE-DRAFT/zenodo_upload_d2_note_runbook.md section 2 ('CC BY 4.0; same as the rest of the SIARC v1.3 cohort')
_substrate_anchors.communities_source: tex/submitted/submission_log.txt items 1-10 carry no explicit communities tag; D2-NOTE-DRAFT/zenodo_upload_d2_note_runbook.md section 2 leaves communities to operator decision; mirroring as empty array
_substrate_anchors.publication_type_source: D2-NOTE-DRAFT/zenodo_upload_d2_note_runbook.md section 2 ('Resource type: Publication -> Preprint'); same value used by all 10 sister Zenodo entries in submission_log.txt
_substrate_anchors.publication_date_source: zenodo_description_d2_note.txt L3 ('v1.0, 2026-05-02') -- the artefact freeze date, not today; deposit form will record today's date as the upload-event date in addition
_substrate_anchors.related_identifiers_source: D2-NOTE-DRAFT/zenodo_upload_d2_note_runbook.md section 3 (10 entries); zenodo_description_d2_note.txt 'Related Identifiers' block (8 References + 2 Is documented by)

title: Newton-polygon universality of the Borel-singularity radius for polynomial continued fractions
description_paste_instruction: Paste the entire 'Description' block of zenodo_description_d2_note.txt (the lines between the '<!-- ===== Description ===== -->' marker and the '<!-- ===== Related Identifiers (DataCite, operator-applied at upload) ===== -->' marker). Zenodo's HTML editor accepts the markdown-flavoured plaintext; do not retype, paste verbatim. Inline math expressions of the form xi_0(b) = d / beta_d^(1/d) are kept as ASCII to avoid HTML-stripping of TeX.

related_identifiers._label: D2-NOTE-DRAFT bridge session (build artefacts + AEAL ledger)

files_to_upload.purpose: Main artefact (4 pages); upload first so Zenodo uses it as default PDF preview

_supersession_warning.trigger: Picture-chain memory + close_out_matrix_2026-05-07.md + sql_todos_snapshot_2026-05-07_18-40-JST.md jointly record TWO already-deposited D2-NOTE versions (v2.0 and v2.1) at concept DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19996689 / version DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19996690 (v2.0, deposited 2026-05-03 ~16:00 JST) / version DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20015923 (v2.1, deposited 2026-05-04 ~07:00 JST).
_supersession_warning.implication: D2-NOTE v1.0 (this metadata payload's target) is the 4-page 343419-B 2026-05-02 pre-cursor to v2.0/v2.1, which are 6-page expansions. Depositing v1.0 NOW (2026-05-07) creates a structural anomaly: either (a) a NEW concept DOI distinct from 19996689 (orphan-concept retroactive deposit of an obsolete draft), or (b) a New-Version of 19996689 inserted BEFORE its current v2.0/v2.1 versions (Zenodo does not support backdated insertion into a version chain).
candidate_dispositions: DROP: rule v1.0 deposit superseded; flip SQL todo zenodo-upload-d2-note to 'done -- superseded by v2.0/v2.1 deposits at 19996689'.

DEPOSIT_AS_NEW_CONCEPT: deposit v1.0 as a fresh concept DOI distinct from 19996689; cite as 'historical 4-page consolidatory draft' in description; flag in submission_log Item NN that v2.0/v2.1 supersede.
DEFER: hold pending W21 LANE-1 ratification; archive this runbook as substrate-only.
_supersession_warning.agent_recommendation: Surface to operator; agent does NOT pre-select. Most economical disposition is DROP given v2.0 6-page expansion already covers the 4-page v1.0 content domain by inclusion (per close_out_matrix line 132 cross-reference).
